title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Aditya Birla Finance

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Aditya Birla Finance
jsonLd.description:
Aditya Birla Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Aditya Birla Finance:
Aditya Birla Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aditya Birla Finance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
